task_completion.description: Wondershare EdrawMax is opened and a new diagram canvas is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Wondershare EdrawMax application interface with a blank or active canvas for diagramming.

task_completion.description: All 9 required nodes are present on the canvas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The canvas contains shapes labeled with the text: 'EHR System', 'Patient Portal', 'Clinical Database', 'HL7 FHIR API', 'Lab Integration', 'Pharmacy System', 'Billing Module', 'Authentication Service', and 'Audit Logging'.

task_completion.description: The diagram is arranged as a network with 'EHR System' in the center.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'EHR System' node is visually positioned in the center of the diagram, with the other nodes radiating outward or surrounding it in a network-style layout.

task_completion.description: Nodes are connected with directional lines containing the correct relationship labels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Lines with arrows connect the nodes, and text labels on or near the lines match the required relationships (e.g., 'serves' from EHR to Patient Portal, 'stores data in' from EHR to Clinical Database, 'exposes' to HL7 FHIR API, etc.).

task_completion.description: The diagram is saved as an .eddx file to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog shows the path '/home/ga/Documents/ehr_concept_map.eddx', or the application title bar displays 'ehr_concept_map.eddx', or a file explorer shows the saved file in the Documents folder.

task_completion.description: The diagram is exported as a .png file to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export' dialog shows the path '/home/ga/Documents/ehr_concept_map.png', or a file explorer/terminal window confirms the existence of 'ehr_concept_map.png' in the Documents directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the EdrawMax GUI to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with EdrawMax menus, toolbars, and the canvas to drag, drop, and connect shapes.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts or commands to bypass the GUI creation of the diagram or PNG.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows should not show commands like ImageMagick, Python scripts, or echo commands being used to generate the .eddx or .png files directly.

integrity.description: The diagram was built from scratch rather than loading a pre-existing completed file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Intermediate screenshots show the diagram in partial states of completion (e.g., some nodes added, then connections drawn) rather than instantly appearing fully formed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Required nodes: 'EHR System', 'Patient Portal', 'Clinical Database', 'HL7 FHIR API', 'Lab Integration', 'Pharmacy System', 'Billing Module', 'Authentication Service', 'Audit Logging'. Required relationships: 'serves', 'stores data in', 'exposes', 'connects to', 'communicates with', 'triggers', 'secures', 'monitors', 'reads from'. Expected save paths: /home/ga/Documents/ehr_concept_map.eddx and /home/ga/Documents/ehr_concept_map.png.
